benefits.description: Already feeling effects on 1mg/week in first week

side_effects.description: Concerned about gastroparesis risk from GLP-1s after reading about it; sketched out in first week

protocol_notes: On first week of Retatrutide starting at 1mg/week. Plans to stay at 1mg for a while and titrate up by 0.5mg every two weeks if needed. Also following keto diet and planning to maintain hydration and fiber intake through psyllium husk. Titration plan: slow, 4+ weeks between dose increases.
